<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>DummyJSON Users — Analysis README</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&family=Fraunces:ital,wght@0,300;0,700;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  :root {
    --bg:        #0d1117;
    --surface:   #161b22;
    --border:    #21262d;
    --accent:    #58a6ff;
    --accent2:   #bc8cff;
    --accent3:   #3fb950;
    --text:      #e6edf3;
    --muted:     #8b949e;
    --tag-bg:    #1f2937;
  }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    min-height: 100vh;
  }

  /* ── Noise overlay ── */
  body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed; inset: 0;
    background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
  }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    position: relative;
    padding: 80px 40px 60px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1117 0%, #161b22 50%, #0d1117 100%);
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -120px; right: -120px;
    width: 400px; height: 400px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(88,166,255,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .hero-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 3px 12px;
    background: rgba(63,185,80,0.15);
    border: 1px solid rgba(63,185,80,0.3);
    border-radius: 20px;
    color: var(--accent3);
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .hero h1 {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: clamp(32px, 5vw, 56px);
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.1;
    color: var(--text);
    max-width: 720px;
  }
  .hero h1 span { color: var(--accent); }
  .hero p {
    margin-top: 20px;
    color: var(--muted);
    max-width: 580px;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.8;
  }
  .hero-meta {
    display: flex;
    gap: 24px;
    margin-top: 32px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .meta-chip {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }
  .meta-chip .dot {
    width: 6px; height: 6px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--accent);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .meta-chip .dot.green { background: var(--accent3); }
  .meta-chip .dot.purple { background: var(--accent2); }

  /* ── LAYOUT ── */
  .container {
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 32px;
  }

  /* ── SECTIONS ── */
  section {
    padding: 60px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .section-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--accent);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 26px;
    font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--text);
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }
  .section-title strong { font-weight: 700; }

  /* ── STATS GRID ── */
  .stats-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr));
    gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
  }
  .stat-card {
    background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 20px 18px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .stat-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
  .stat-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
  }
  .stat-value {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text);
  }
  .stat-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-top: 4px;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }

  /* ── CHART GRID ── */
  .charts-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: 24px;
  }
  .charts-grid.single { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .chart-card {
    background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: transform 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .chart-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    border-color: rgba(88,166,255,0.3);
  }
  .chart-card.wide { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
  .chart-header {
    padding: 14px 18px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }
  .chart-title {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--text);
    font-weight: 500;
  }
  .chart-tag {
    font-size: 10px;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    background: var(--tag-bg);
    border-radius: 4px;
    color: var(--accent2);
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }
  .chart-body img {
    width: 100%;
    display: block;
    background: #fff;
  }
  .chart-caption {
    padding: 12px 18px;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1.6;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  /* ── CODE BLOCK ── */
  .code-section { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; }
  .code-header {
    padding: 10px 18px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted);
  }
  .code-dots { display: flex; gap: 6px; }
  .code-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; }
  pre {
    padding: 24px 20px;
    overflow-x: auto;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: #e6edf3;
  }
  .kw  { color: #ff7b72; }
  .fn  { color: #d2a8ff; }
  .st  { color: #a5d6ff; }
  .cm  { color: #8b949e; font-style: italic; }
  .num { color: #79c0ff; }

  /* ── FINDINGS ── */
  .findings-list { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
  .finding {
    display: flex; gap: 14px; align-items: flex-start;
    padding: 16px 18px;
    background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted);
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .finding:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
  .finding-num {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--accent);
    min-width: 32px; line-height: 1;
    margin-top: 2px;
  }
  .finding strong { color: var(--text); display: block; margin-bottom: 2px; font-size: 13px; }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer {
    padding: 40px 32px;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--muted);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  /* ── LIGHTBOX ── */
  #lightbox {
    display: none;
    position: fixed; inset: 0;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.85);
    z-index: 1000;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
    cursor: zoom-out;
  }
  #lightbox.open { display: flex; }
  #lightbox img {
    max-width: 90vw;
    max-height: 90vh;
    border-radius: 10px;
    box-shadow: 0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
    animation: zoomIn 0.2s ease;
  }
  @keyframes zoomIn {
    from { opacity:0; transform:scale(0.92); }
    to   { opacity:1; transform:scale(1); }
  }

  /* ── SCROLL REVEAL ── */
  .reveal {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(24px);
    transition: opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;
  }
  .reveal.visible {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  @media (max-width: 700px) {
    .charts-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .hero { padding: 48px 20px 40px; }
    .container { padding: 0 16px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="hero-badge">📊 Data Analysis Project</div>
    <h1>DummyJSON <span>Users</span><br/>Exploratory Analysis</h1>
    <p>A comprehensive visual analysis of user demographics, geographic distribution, and physical attributes sourced from the DummyJSON REST API. Built with Python, Pandas, and Seaborn.</p>
    <div class="hero-meta">
      <div class="meta-chip"><span class="dot green"></span>207 Users Analysed</div>
      <div class="meta-chip"><span class="dot"></span>API: dummyjson.com/users</div>
      <div class="meta-chip"><span class="dot purple"></span>7 Visualisations</div>
      <div class="meta-chip"><span class="dot green"></span>Python · Pandas · Seaborn</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS -->
<section>
  <div class="container reveal">
    <div class="section-label">Overview</div>
    <div class="section-title"><strong>Key Findings</strong> at a Glance</div>
    <div class="stats-grid">
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">207</div><div class="stat-label">Total Users</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">~33 yrs</div><div class="stat-label">Average Age</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">105</div><div class="stat-label">Female Users</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">102</div><div class="stat-label">Male Users</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">Phoenix</div><div class="stat-label">Top City (#1)</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">~175 cm</div><div class="stat-label">Avg Height</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CHARTS -->
<section>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-label reveal">Visualisations</div>
    <div class="section-title reveal"><strong>All Charts</strong> from the Analysis</div>

    <div class="charts-grid">

      <!-- Chart 1 -->
      <div class="chart-card reveal" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
        <div class="chart-header">
          <span class="chart-title">Age Distribution by Gender</span>
          <span class="chart-tag">histplot + kde</span>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-body">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Age Distribution by Gender"/>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-caption">Most users fall between ages 25–35. Female users skew slightly younger. KDE curves reveal a bimodal pattern in male ages.</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Chart 2 - Box -->
      <div class="chart-card reveal" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
        <div class="chart-header">
          <span class="chart-title">Weight vs Age</span>
          <span class="chart-tag">boxplot</span>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-body">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Weight vs Age Boxplot"/>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-caption">Weight distributions per age group show no strong linear trend, with most medians clustered between 70–85 kg across all ages.</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Chart 3 -->
      <div class="chart-card reveal" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
        <div class="chart-header">
          <span class="chart-title">Average Age by Gender</span>
          <span class="chart-tag">barplot</span>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-body">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Average Age by Gender"/>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-caption">Males average ~35 years vs females at ~31.5 years — a ~3.5 year gap in the dataset.</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Chart 4 -->
      <div class="chart-card reveal" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
        <div class="chart-header">
          <span class="chart-title">Number of Users per Gender</span>
          <span class="chart-tag">countplot</span>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-body">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Users per Gender"/>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-caption">Gender distribution is nearly balanced: 105 female vs 102 male users — a 51/49 split.</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Chart 5 - Cities (wide) -->
      <div class="chart-card wide reveal" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
        <div class="chart-header">
          <span class="chart-title">Top 10 Cities with Most Users</span>
          <span class="chart-tag">barplot (horizontal)</span>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-body">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Top 10 Cities"/>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-caption">Phoenix leads with 17 users, followed by Dallas (15) and Jacksonville / Los Angeles (14 each). The top 10 cities span both coasts and the Sun Belt.</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Chart 6 -->
      <div class="chart-card reveal" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
        <div class="chart-header">
          <span class="chart-title">Age vs Height</span>
          <span class="chart-tag">scatterplot + regplot</span>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-body">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Age vs Height"/>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-caption">Nearly flat regression line confirms no meaningful correlation between age and height (r ≈ 0). Gender clustering is visible.</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Chart 7 -->
      <div class="chart-card reveal" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
        <div class="chart-header">
          <span class="chart-title">Age vs Weight</span>
          <span class="chart-tag">scatterplot + regplot</span>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-body">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Age vs Weight"/>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-caption">A slight positive trend (r ≈ 0.15) suggests weight increases marginally with age, but the effect is weak — scatter dominates.</div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CODE -->
<section>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-label reveal">Source Code</div>
    <div class="section-title reveal">How the <strong>Data was Fetched</strong></div>
    <div class="code-section reveal">
      <div class="code-header">
        <div class="code-dots">
          <div class="code-dot" style="background:#ff5f57"></div>
          <div class="code-dot" style="background:#febc2e"></div>
          <div class="code-dot" style="background:#28c840"></div>
        </div>
        analysis.py
      </div>
      <pre><span class="kw">import</span> requests
<span class="kw">import</span> pandas <span class="kw">as</span> pd
<span class="kw">import</span> seaborn <span class="kw">as</span> sns
<span class="kw">import</span> matplotlib.pyplot <span class="kw">as</span> plt

<span class="cm"># Paginate through all users</span>
total, skip, limit, pages = <span class="num">0</span>, <span class="num">0</span>, <span class="num">100</span>, []
<span class="kw">while True</span>:
    r    = requests.<span class="fn">get</span>(<span class="st">f'https://dummyjson.com/users?limit=<span class="num">{limit}</span>&skip=<span class="num">{skip}</span>'</span>)
    data = r.<span class="fn">json</span>()
    pages.<span class="fn">append</span>(pd.<span class="fn">DataFrame</span>(data[<span class="st">'users'</span>]))
    total = data[<span class="st">'total'</span>]
    skip += limit
    <span class="kw">if</span> skip >= total: <span class="kw">break</span>

df = pd.<span class="fn">concat</span>(pages)

<span class="cm"># Extract nested address fields</span>
df[<span class="st">'city'</span>]    = df[<span class="st">'address'</span>].<span class="fn">apply</span>(<span class="kw">lambda</span> x: x[<span class="st">'city'</span>])
df[<span class="st">'country'</span>] = df[<span class="st">'address'</span>].<span class="fn">apply</span>(<span class="kw">lambda</span> x: x[<span class="st">'country'</span>])

<span class="cm"># Drop unused columns</span>
df.<span class="fn">drop</span>(columns=[<span class="st">'id'</span>,<span class="st">'username'</span>,<span class="st">'birthDate'</span>,<span class="st">'image'</span>,
                  <span class="st">'address'</span>,<span class="st">'bank'</span>,<span class="st">'company'</span>,...], inplace=<span class="kw">True</span>)
df.<span class="fn">drop_duplicates</span>(inplace=<span class="kw">True</span>)

<span class="cm"># Set global Seaborn theme</span>
sns.<span class="fn">set_style</span>(<span class="st">"whitegrid"</span>)
sns.<span class="fn">set_context</span>(<span class="st">"paper"</span>, font_scale=<span class="num">1.2</span>)
sns.<span class="fn">set_palette</span>(<span class="st">"viridis"</span>)</pre>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FINDINGS -->
<section>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-label reveal">Conclusions</div>
    <div class="section-title reveal"><strong>Key Takeaways</strong> from the Data</div>
    <ul class="findings-list">
      <li class="finding reveal">
        <div class="finding-num">01</div>
        <div><strong>Age is concentrated in the 25–35 range</strong>Both genders peak in their late 20s, with males showing a secondary cluster around 35–40.</div>
      </li>
      <li class="finding reveal">
        <div class="finding-num">02</div>
        <div><strong>Gender split is nearly 50/50</strong>105 female vs 102 male — the dataset is well-balanced with no significant sampling skew.</div>
      </li>
      <li class="finding reveal">
        <div class="finding-num">03</div>
        <div><strong>Phoenix dominates geographically</strong>With 17 users, Phoenix leads all cities. The top 10 is dominated by large Sun Belt and coastal metros.</div>
      </li>
      <li class="finding reveal">
        <div class="finding-num">04</div>
        <div><strong>No meaningful age–height relationship (r ≈ 0)</strong>Height is driven by gender, not age. The regression line is essentially flat across all age groups.</div>
      </li>
      <li class="finding reveal">
        <div class="finding-num">05</div>
        <div><strong>Weak positive age–weight correlation</strong>A marginal upward trend in weight with age exists, but variance is high and the effect is not clinically significant.</div>
      </li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div>Built with Python · Pandas · Seaborn · Matplotlib &nbsp;|&nbsp; Data source: <a href="https://dummyjson.com/users" style="color:var(--accent);text-decoration:none;">dummyjson.com/users</a></div>
  <div style="margin-top:8px;color:#3d444d;">Click any chart to enlarge &uarr;</div>
</footer>

<!-- LIGHTBOX -->
<div id="lightbox" onclick="closeLightbox()">
  <img id="lightbox-img" src="" alt="Chart enlarged"/>
</div>

<script>
  // Lightbox
  function openLightbox(card) {
    const img = card.querySelector('img');
    document.getElementById('lightbox-img').src = img.src;
    document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.add('open');
  }
  function closeLightbox() {
    document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('open');
  }
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if(e.key === 'Escape') closeLightbox(); });

  // Scroll reveal
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
